content_body: We had an absolutely fabulous time at Serendipity on Noontootla! The cabin was absolutely beautiful, very clean, stocked with everything you could want, and everything was very comfortable! We had 9 guests and had plenty of room! The game room was lots of fun! If you’re looking for a great cabin vacation, definitely check out Cabin Rentals of Georgia!!
title: What a Great Cabin Vacation!
